item.title: Collapse npm detection block in _init_detect_project
item.intent: npm validation command detection is 8 lines instead of 22. Three separate jq calls for has_test/has_build/has_check are replaced by a single priority-ordered jq expression.
item.description: _init_detect_project has a 22-line block that calls jq 3 times into package.json to extract has_test, has_build, has_check, then uses a 4-way if/elif chain to pick the validation command. Replace with a single jq call that returns the best available script name, then map to the command string.
steps: Replace 3 separate jq calls with one jq expression that checks scripts.check, scripts.build, scripts.test in priority order
Map the result to the validation command string (npm run check, npm run build, npm test, etc.)
Remove the has_test/has_build/has_check variables and the 4-way if/elif
Verify: init -y on a node project detects the same validation command as before
acceptanceCriteria: npm script detection uses one jq call, not three
init -y detects the correct validation command for projects with check, build, test, or combinations
